titleStmt.title: SII 20.44: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 44. (B.K. No. 62 of 1937-38.) RŪGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone leaning against the front wall of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 991, Kīlaka, Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Dakshiṇāyana [Saṁkrānti]. This date is irregular. The cyclic year corresponding to the given Śaka year was Saumya and not Kīlaka. The intended date seems to be A.D. 1069, June 21 when the tithi was amāvāsyā and the week-day was Sunday. The Saṁkrānti, however, occurred three days later.

The inscription records the gift of certain money incomes made by Mādhavayya Nāyaka with the permission of the king for the benefit of the temple of Nakharēśvara at Rūvige when Pāyyarasa was governing Tardavāḍi division.

The inscription also refers to another gift of oil made by the Fifty Telliga tenants for a lamp in the temple of Kēdārēśvara of the place (i.e., Rūvige) in the year Śaka 967, Pārthiva, Pushya śu. 5, Sunday Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. This date corresponds to A.D. 1045, December 15, Sunday, f.d.t. 64. There was no Saṁkrānti on this date. It appears that this gift was revived as in the case of No. 45 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: The top portion is completely effaced.

paramēsvarada sakavarṣada
991 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada damāsye
Ādityavāra dakṣiṇāyana śrīmatu
bhuvanaikamalladēvara śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara
pāyyarasaru tarddavāḍi mumanāḷdara
su geyvuttamire mādhava
yya nāyaka śrīmatu bhuvenaika
malladēvargge binnapaṁ geydu rūvigeya śrī
mannakharēsvara dēvanaivēdyakaṁ grahārada
genūṟa haṁna
ṇigaruṁ nūṟi Alliya
manneyaru neṟadu ra besadiṁ Aṁ
tarakeḻe Aruvaṇaṁ neyaṁ
kālamuṁ kēṇiyāgi mogga dali paṁ
nāyadiṁ kēṇiyāgi na ḍe voṁduyiṁtinitumaṁ
moggade karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ panneraḍuṁ vūroḍeyaruṁ pra
yi dharmmamaṁ naḍasidavargganaṁ
tapuṇyavidanaḷidavarge vāraṇāsiyoḷu kavileyuṁ brāhmaṇaru
manaḷida dōsā sārguṁ . sakavarṣa 967 neya pārtthivasaṁ
vatsarada puśya suddha 5 Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁ
krāntiyaṁdu telliga gōkayya caṭṭayya kētayya
yya huliyamma Aycamayya sōmayya
niṁtivarmmodalāgi telligarayvattokkalellimirddu
llalliya kēdāradēvara naṁdādīvigege gāṇadoḷu so
ḷasa 1 yeṇṇe yellā kālakkaṁ naḍevaṁtāgi biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 20.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
